title: Weather Disruption
description: Shipment CP-1096 predicted to delay by 12 hours due to heavy rainfall on Kerala-Karnataka border route.
recommendation: Reroute cargo through Mysore bypass road hub to avoid regional flooding.

title: Port Delay Warning
description: Shipment CP-1093 delayed at Chennai Terminal for customs documentation processing.
recommendation: Upload verified digitized airway bill via ChainPulse portal to auto-clear checkpoint.

title: Critical Stock Shortage
description: Bangalore Central Hub reports critical levels for Category-A electronic items (< 15% safety stock).
recommendation: Initiate immediate stock transfer of 500 units from nearby Pune Surplus Warehouse.

title: Traffic Congestion
description: High traffic density detected on Mumbai-Pune expressway causing minor transit slowdown.
recommendation: Maintain standard route. GPS tracking shows delay is within standard 2-hour buffer.
